title: picris scaberrima
intro: Picris scaberrima, also known as prickly hawk's beard or rough hawk's beard, is a perennial herb native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce pain and inflammation, and relieve respiratory problems. The health benefits of Picris scaberrima include its ability to treat conditions such as diarrhea, dysentery, and bronchitis, as well as its use as a diuretic and expectorant. Herbal preparations of Picris scaberrima can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often combined with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
